case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 0-180s metrics. Checkoutservice latency.p90 dev=+3.1 and recommendationservice latency.p90 dev=+2.9 indicate propagation delays. Cartservice mem dev=+2.1 shows early resource pressure. Root cause is checkoutservice latency.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 90-210s checkoutservice metrics. Latency.p90 dev=+3.1 (0.421755s) and frontend>checkoutservice trace latency.self_p99 dev=+1.9 (233ms) confirm propagation delays. No mem/cpu anomalies. Root cause remains checkoutservice latency.
